= sin


Calculates the sine of a given angle specified in radians.


== Examples

[,bloblang]
----
root.new_value = (this.value * (pi() / 180)).sin()

# In:  {"value":45}
# Out: {"new_value":0.7071067811865475}

# In:  {"value":0}
# Out: {"new_value":0}

# In:  {"value":90}
# Out: {"new_value":1}
----
